form.formComment: Jumps from box 1 for the first time after placing latest at Q Straight (19.20) in a Grade 5. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Jumps from box 1 for the first time after placing latest at Q Straight (19.20) in a Grade 5. Looks hard to beat with even luck.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 366m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (19.91) behind Zipping Daytona in a Grade 5 on March 22. With a good start will take catching.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 2nd over 366m at this track beaten 4.5 lengths (19.91) behind Zipping Daytona in a Grade 5 on March 22. With a good start will take catching.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Abruptly gave ground approaching the winning post.

form.formComment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 366m at this track. Can't recommend against this lot.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Modest effort last time out when fifth over 366m at this track. Can't recommend against this lot.

form.formComment: At the last outing finished 5th on April 2 over 484m at Casino behind Kingsbrae Julie beaten 3 lengths (28.25) in a Grade 5. Solid claims this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: At the last outing finished 5th on April 2 over 484m at Casino behind Kingsbrae Julie beaten 3 lengths (28.25) in a Grade 5. Solid claims this line-up.

form.formComment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished fifth over 352m at Q Lakeside, beaten 10 lengths. Would be better placed in something easier.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has shown little speed out of the boxes and tends to spot them a start in her races, Last start finished fifth over 352m at Q Lakeside, beaten 10 lengths. Would be better placed in something easier.

form.formComment: Closed last campaign finishing fifth at Q Lakeside over 457m four months ago. Wide draw and looks tested this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Closed last campaign finishing fifth at Q Lakeside over 457m four months ago. Wide draw and looks tested this time.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Q Parklands over 600m. Happy to risk in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fourth at his last couple of starts, most recently at Q Parklands over 600m. Happy to risk in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Buffeted shortly after the start; Bumped entering the home straight.

form.formComment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 300m at Q Straight by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 5. Can make it two on the bounce.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to score just six days ago over 300m at Q Straight by 1.5 lengths in a Grade 5. Can make it two on the bounce.

form.formComment: Goes well at this track and trip. Most recently finished 6th on March 30 over 300m at Q Straight behind Shian Mikey beaten 6 lengths (17.16) in a Grade 5. Must be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Goes well at this track and trip. Most recently finished 6th on March 30 over 300m at Q Straight behind Shian Mikey beaten 6 lengths (17.16) in a Grade 5. Must be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on at the end of the back straight and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage seventh last time out over 390m at Q Lakeside. Can't enthuse on this occasion.
